narrative:
Westerville 3-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 774 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.8 percentage points.
